summary: Filter gamLoadResource's local-store read by resource-name network prefix (new gamItemsForNetwork helper) so a mirror populated for one network is never served when a different --network is requested; fall through to a live fetch when the store holds nothing for the requested network.
reason: Flagged during library review round 2 (PR #1243): the store keys resources by type alone, so 'adunits tree' and 'inventory orphans' run against a second network after the first was cached silently returned the first network's data. This mirrors the network-prefix filter the 'since' command already applies in its SQL WHERE clause.
validated_outcome: TestGamItemsForNetwork covers bare/normalized/other-network/substring-safety/unknown/empty cases; full cli package test suite passes in both trees with no caller-test regressions.
